project_name: Style n Arts Women's hair, Beauty and Makeup

brand_direction.vibe: modern feminine salon, clean, confident, warm, skilled
brand_direction.tone: Premium but approachable, hygienic, appointment-friendly, locally trusted

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

sections.name: Sticky Header
sections.instructions: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80). Logo text on left in Playfair Display. Nav links (Services, Bridal, Gallery, Contact). Primary CTA button 'Call to Book' (tel: +91 77607 11425) in deep rose. Must be z-50 and sticky.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions: Split layout or rich overlay. Left: Large Playfair heading. Subheadline about HSR Layout's top-rated salon. Two CTAs: 'Call to Book' (solid deep rose) and 'Get Directions' (outline). Right: High-quality image of hair styling. Include a floating badge '4.9 ⭐ (1,700+ Reviews)'.

sections.name: Trust Strip
sections.instructions: Full-width banner across the screen just below the hero. Background: Soft Blush (#FDF8F7). Content: 4 flex items horizontally (4.9 Stars & 1700 Reviews, 7+ Years Experience, HSR Layout, Open till 9:30 PM). Use small gold accents/icons for each.

sections.name: Services Menu
sections.instructions: Clean, elegant layout with generous spacing. Group by categories: Hair, Makeup, Skincare, Nails. Use a list structure with a subtle dotted line connecting service name to INR price. Charcoal text for high readability.

sections.name: Bridal & Party Makeup Highlight
sections.instructions: High contrast section. Background: Deep Rose (#9E3C55). Text: Warm Ivory (#FAF9F6). Asymmetrical layout showcasing stunning Indian bridal makeup image on one side, and service details on the other. Elegant, premium feel.

sections.name: Salon Experience
sections.instructions: Bento grid (4 blocks). Highlight hygiene, expert consultation, women-only safe space, and wheelchair accessibility. Use lucide-react icons (in Gold #C5A059). Soft blush surface cards with subtle border (#EEDDDE). Optical alignment.

sections.name: Gallery Grid
sections.instructions: Asymmetrical masonry or tetris grid (Mode A) showing the salon's work (hair, nails, interior, makeup). Mix tall (row-span-2) and wide images. Use rounded corners and subtle hover scaling.

sections.name: Location & Contact
sections.instructions: Two columns. Left: Address text, phone, working hours (till 9:30 pm), and a 'Get Directions' CTA button. Right: A styled Google Maps embed or a highly stylized static map image. Background: Warm Ivory.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Deep Charcoal (#222222) background, Warm Ivory text. Large typography for brand name. Links to sections. Address and copyright.

buttons.primary: bg-[#9E3C55] text-white hover:bg-[#8A3349] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: border border-[#9E3C55] text-[#9E3C55] hover:bg-[#FDF8F7] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium flex items-center gap-2

hero.alt: Hairdresser styling woman's hair in modern salon

bridal_highlight.alt: Beautiful Indian bride with stunning jewelry

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, forms) MUST have a kebab-case, role-based data-testid attribute.
animation_guidelines: Smooth hover states for buttons (colors, transform). Slight image scaling on hover in the gallery. Fade-in for sections as they scroll into view.
